title: Luffy Refuses an Easy Victory
description: Pages 8–12 focus on luffy refuses an easy victory, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Dressrosa Citizens, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Tontatta, Franky as bellamy forces Luffy into an emotional fight, while Law and Doflamingo prepare for the decisive clash.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yes but... your entire body is dripping blood!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'm fine... I'm still conscious. More importantly, I'm glad you're okay. It must have been hell for you in there.

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: If you'd like to use your power... There are countless people across this country that need it more than I do.

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: I'd heard what's going on from Leo and the others, but...

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: It seems we've managed to destroy the factory as well... our battle proceeds now to its moment of truth!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I never imagined it'd be this bad!

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: will we be able to return this country to the hands of King Riku...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Or will it fall yet again into darkness and despair...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: As long as that man draws breath... We cannot rest easy...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Our hopes rest now with a certain group of pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Below the Palace inside Rampart Tower

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I've just made it inside Rampart tower.

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Sabo-kun, can you make it over here? What is your location?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: I'm helping the last prisoners out of the colossseum!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Besides, there isn't much that you can't deal with by yourself, is there?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: "I don't could have dealt with this alone, I wouldn't have con- tacted you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Luffy will be in harms way!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: I'm fine, not even... a scratch...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: ZOROO! Thank you! My life flashed right before my eyes!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Zoro- Dono! What a magnificent display!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: PIRATE! You have my thanks! I thought my eyes were deceiving me when I saw that statue split!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Wait a damn second, all of you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: The fact that it still stands is proof that the guy behind it is still standing.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: But, according to Lady Viola, most of the enemy's strength has already...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: They've only got three big players left!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: You won't make it out of this alive!

summary: Luffy Refuses an Easy Victory advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Dressrosa Citizens, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
